app_release_notes: v1.2.2 - Target groups sent from your phone now get their own review list on the desktop: see each one, delete any you do not want, and add the rest to a load to score it. The phone-loads review list gained a delete button on each row, and the sidebar shortcuts for items waiting from your phone no longer clip their text.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.2.2 - Target groups sent from your phone now get their own review list on the desktop: see each one, delete any you do not want, and add the rest to a load to score it. The phone-loads review list gained a delete button on each row, and the sidebar shortcuts for items waiting from your phone no longer clip their text.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.2.0 - Send the rifles and recipes you built on the Loadscope Ballistics phone app straight to your desktop over Wi-Fi. They import as new loads marked 'from phone, not yet tested' and never overwrite a load you already have.
